title: Android Fundamentals
html:
Android Fundamentals

Android Fundamentals

Install ADB on Linux.

apt-get install adb

Install ADB on MacOS.

`/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"`<br/>`brew update`<br/>`brew install android-platform-tools`

Install ADB on Windows.

`Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser`<br/>`iex (New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://get.scoop.sh')`<br/>`scoop bucket add extras`<br/>`scoop install adb`

Start ADB server.

adb start-server

List Android Virtual Devices (AVDs).

adb devices

Open an interactive shell on the device.

adb shell

Restart ADB as root.

adb root

Install an app on the device.

adb install myapp.apk

Push files to the device.

adb push ./myapp.apk /sdcard/Download/

Pull app from the device to the local host.

adb pull /sdcard/Download/myapp.apk .
